DocLinkChecker 1.40.0+12.Branch.main.Sha.d4a50ef3c2ffff2964910134c9a9e11492128588
DocFx Companion Tools

  -d, --docfolder      (Group: Documents) Folder containing the documents.

  -f, --config         (Group: Documents) Configuration file to load for
                       settings.

  -v, --verbose        Show verbose messages.

  -a, --attachments    Check unreferenced files in .attachments.

  -c, --cleanup        Cleanup unreferenced files in .attachments.

  -t, --table          Check that tables are well formed.

  -x, --external       Validate links to external sources.

  --help               Display this help screen.

  --version            Display version information.
